footer.text: LLMWikiNG – by ZeroDot1 · Powered by FastAPI + qmd ·

index.sync_recommended_desc: New or modified files have been detected.
index.welcome_subtitle: Your local, LLM-maintained knowledge wiki following the Karpathy pattern. A compounding artifact of interlinked Markdown files.

page.orphaned_links_desc: The following linked pages do not yet exist:
page.log_auto_desc: 📅 The logbook is maintained automatically by the LLM Wiki.
page.log_clear_confirm: Do you really want to clear the logbook? All recorded activities will be lost.
page.delete_confirm: Do you really want to permanently delete this wiki page?

search.heading: 🔍 Full Text Search
search.subtitle: Search the entire wiki for terms, articles, or cross-references.
search.index_outdated_desc: New or modified pages have been detected in the wiki.
search.topic_not_exists: does not yet exist in the wiki, but is mentioned in
search.relevance_threshold: ✔ Meets the relevance threshold (≥ 3 mentions) for creating a dedicated wiki page.
search.no_results_hint: Check your spelling or use more general terms.
search.idle_hint: Enter a search term above to search the wiki.

ingest.heading: 📥 Manage Sources
ingest.subtitle: Import new sources directly into your wiki or save URLs and texts for later processing.
ingest.go_to_new_page: Go to newly created wiki page →
ingest.title_optional: Title (optional, will be extracted from file otherwise):
ingest.text_content_placeholder: Type or paste your text here...
ingest.text_later_content_placeholder: Add notes here that you want to structure later...
ingest.loading_text: LLM is analyzing the source and maintaining the wiki... Please wait...

about.heading: ℹ️ About LLMWikiNG
about.intro: LLMWikiNG (OKF Edition) is a local, privacy-friendly wiki platform developed by ZeroDot1, based on the standardized Open Knowledge Format (OKF) v0.1 and inspired by the Karpathy LLM-Wiki-Pattern. The wiki is maintained and expanded by intelligent AI assistants – and you can comfortably read, search, and manage it in your browser.
about.thanks: Special thanks go to tevsa for the great idea and excellent support in implementing this project!
about.feature_markdown: 📦 Open Knowledge Format (OKF) – Fully compliant with the OKF v0.1 specification (YAML frontmatter, types, resources, and structured paths).
about.feature_graph: 🕸️ Knowledge Graph – Interactive, color-coded visual network map of all connections (runs offline via Vis.js). Contradictions and tensions are shown as red dashed lines.
about.feature_timeline: 📜 Activity Timeline – Chronological list of recent ingests, deletions, and exports right on the homepage in OKF log format.
about.feature_briefings: 📰 Weekly Reports & Email Briefings – Aggregates weekly wiki changes into reports and sends them securely via an integrated SMTP client. Includes quick presets for Gmail, ProtonMail Bridge, and Mail.ru.
about.feature_search: 🔍 Full Text Search – Ultra-fast BM25 search in wiki, raw sources, and exported documents with hit highlighting.
about.feature_pending: ⏳ Pending Ingest – Import manually placed files into the wiki individually or in batch ("Ingest All") at the push of a button.
about.feature_export: 📤 Export & Management – Copy wiki pages to the export folder for viewing or downloading.
about.feature_ingestlater: 📝 Save for Later – Note web URLs and texts for later import (wish list).
about.feature_lint: 🩹 Health Check (Lint) – Detects orphaned pages, non-existent link targets (prioritized by frequency), and stale pages.
about.feature_theme: 🌙 Tokyo-Night Theme – Extremely elegant, high-contrast dark theme for eye-friendly work.
about.feature_update: ⬇️ Self-Update – Integrated update function: Checks for new GitHub versions and updates itself with one click. Protects wiki, raw sources, and configuration.
about.third_party_intro: This project uses the following external components:
about.vis_network_desc: Custom dependency-free graph engine – force-directed layout via Canvas 2D API.

status.heading: 📊 System Status & Statistics
status.subtitle: Overview of your LLM Wiki instance's health, connected tools, and database statistics.
status.sync_needed_text: 🔄 Sync required. New or modified files have been detected in the wiki or raw sources that are not yet in the search index.
status.sync_ok_text: ✅ System synchronized. All search indices and overviews are up to date.
status.update_available_desc: Download the latest version from GitHub and update all program files. Your wiki pages, raw sources, exports, and configuration will be preserved.
status.update_confirm: Run update now?\n\nThe web server must be restarted after the update.
status.update_not_available: update.sh not found – Update function not available.

lint.heading: 🏥 Wiki Health Check (Lint)
lint.subtitle: The health check analyzes your wiki for structural issues, such as orphaned pages (with no incoming links) or links to pages that don't exist yet.
lint.no_issues_detail: Your wiki is healthy and fully linked.
lint.orphans_desc: These pages exist, but no other page in the wiki links to them. Add links in other articles to make them discoverable.
lint.missing_desc: These pages are linked via [PageName]() in articles, but no wiki page has been created for them yet. Click the links to create them via Ingest.
lint.stale_desc: These are the longest-unedited pages in the wiki. Check them periodically to ensure the knowledge is still current.
lint.raw_refs_desc: These wiki pages reference a raw file in the raw/ folder that does not physically exist.
lint.raw_refs_empty: ✅ All referenced raw files exist in raw/.
lint.okf_type_desc: Every OKF-compliant wiki page must have a `type` field in its YAML frontmatter (e.g. Concept, Article, Reference, Playbook).
lint.okf_links_desc: These links in the format [Text](/path.md) or [Text](./path.md) point to targets that do not exist in the wiki.
lint.okf_links_empty: ✅ All absolute/relative markdown links are intact.
lint.idle_hint: Click the button above to start the health check.

config.heading: ⚙️ Email & SMTP Configuration
config.subtitle: Configure your SMTP server details for automatic and secure sending of weekly wiki briefings.
config.smtp_user_env_ok: ✔ Environment variable GMAIL_USER found. Will be used as fallback.
config.smtp_user_env_hint: Leave empty to use GMAIL_USER from system environment variables.
config.smtp_pass_env_ok: ✔ Environment variable GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD found. Will be used as fallback.
config.smtp_pass_env_hint: Leave empty to use GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD from system environment variables.
config.recipients_hint: These email addresses will receive the briefings by default.

update.heading: ⬇️ LLMWikiNG Update
update.github_token_label: GitHub Personal Access Token (for private repositories):
update.intro: Fetch the latest version of ZeroDot1/LLMWikiNG via Git and update all program files.
update.checking_text: Checking for new version on GitHub…
update.sections_heading: The following areas will be updated:
update.section_replaced_items: llmWiki.py (Webserver); email_sender.py (Email); wiki.sh, start.sh, update.sh; prompts/ (System Prompts); templates/ (HTML Templates); static/ (CSS, JS); tools/ (Helper Scripts); VERSION, CHANGELOG, README
update.section_preserved_items: wiki/ (Your Wiki Pages); raw/ (Your Raw Sources); output_docs/ (Your Exports); config.json (SMTP Settings); .agy.yaml (LLM Configuration)
update.run_intro: Click the button to start the update. The script will create a backup beforehand.
update.run_confirm: ⚠️ Run update now?\n\nThe web server must be restarted after the update!
update.not_available_desc: The file update.sh was not found. Please clone the repository:
update.terminal_desc: Alternatively, the update can be run directly in the terminal:

graph.heading: 🕸️ Knowledge Graph
graph.subtitle: Interactive visualization of all linked wiki pages and their relationships.
graph.credit: Visualization: custom dependency-free Canvas graph engine (Vanilla JavaScript).
graph.instruction_pan: Pan / Navigate: Click and drag the background to move the view. Use the mouse wheel to zoom.
graph.instruction_drag: Move Nodes: Drag individual nodes with the mouse to adjust the layout.
graph.instruction_open: Open Page: Double-click a node to jump directly to the corresponding wiki page.
graph.instruction_highlight: Highlight Relationships: Click a node to highlight all directly connected pages.

raw_list.heading: 📦 Raw Sources
raw_list.subtitle: These are your unmodified original documents in the raw/ folder. They serve as the wiki's immutable source of truth.
raw_list.empty_title: No raw sources in the raw/ folder yet.

raw_view.binary_warning: This is a binary file or its format is not natively displayed in the browser.

export_list.heading: 📤 Exported Documents
export_list.subtitle: These are your exported documents in the output_docs/ folder. These files can be shared with others.
export_list.empty_title: No exported documents in the output_docs/ folder yet.
export_list.empty_hint: You can export any wiki page by clicking the button at the bottom of the article.

pending_list.heading: ⏳ Pending Ingest
pending_list.subtitle: These are files in the raw/ folder that have been placed there manually but not yet ingested into the wiki. You can ingest them individually or all at once.
pending_list.empty_title: No pending files. All raw sources have been ingested!
pending_list.loading_text: Ingest is running and the LLM is generating summaries... Please wait...

briefing.heading: 📰 Weekly Briefings (Reports)
briefing.subtitle: Aggregate all new wiki articles of a calendar week into a structured weekly report and simulate email sending to recipients.
briefing.no_entries: No entries registered for this calendar week.
briefing.email_subtitle: Send the weekly report via your SMTP connection.
briefing.email_no_creds: ⚠ No credentials configured. Please set up SMTP or set environment variables.

settings.heading: ⚙️ Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage language, email configuration, and run the health check.
settings.language_subtitle: Choose between available languages for the user interface.
settings.theme_subtitle: Choose between light and dark appearance. The setting is saved permanently in config.json (default: Dark).
settings.config_placeholder: The email configuration loads here from the original form.
settings.health_subtitle: Analyzes your wiki for structural issues.
settings.health_idle_hint: Click the button above to start the health check.
settings.registration_hint: If disabled, users can no longer register themselves via /register. (Note: The initial setup for the very first administrator account is always active if no users exist in the database.)
settings.backup_subtitle: Back up the entire wiki (including all sub-wikis, user databases, API keys, and configuration) as a compressed tar.xz archive, or restore an existing backup.
settings.backup_download_desc: Generates a complete backup and downloads it directly to your computer.
settings.restore_desc: Upload a previously created tar.xz backup file to overwrite all current data.
settings.restore_warning: ⚠️ WARNING: Restoring a backup permanently overwrites all current wiki pages, settings, and user accounts! To prevent session loss, your current login session remains active (your user account will be merged into the restored system).
settings.restore_confirm: Are you sure you want to restore this backup? All current data will be overwritten!

register.title: Register
register.setup_hint: Initial Setup: No users registered yet. Create the first administrator account now.
register.success_subtitle: Your account has been created successfully.
register.success_key_desc: This API Key has been automatically generated for you. Please copy it to a secure location now. It will never be displayed in plain text again!

python_messages.ingest_text_empty: Title and content must not be empty.
python_messages.ingest_all_no_files: No pending files found for ingestion.
python_messages.update_check_error: Could not retrieve version from GitHub.

editor.intro_text: Write or edit documents directly in your browser. After saving, they will be stored in the respective directory.
